product.name: Dry Dual Clutch Transmission Remover Installer Tool Kit, Compatible with Ford Focus Fiesta B-MAX Transit Connect, DPS6 Dual Clutch Transmission Reinstall Reset Tool, FM No. 307675
features: Application: Compatible with Ford Focus Fiesta Dual Clutch Transmission DPS6. Compatible with Fiesta 2011-2019; Focus 2012-2018; Transit Connect 2019; B-MAX since 2012. FM number: 307675.
Function: Specially designed to remove and install the dry transmissions. Using this professional dual clutch transmission tools can save your money instead of purchasing a new DCT clutch assembly.

Easy to use: It can respring/re-trip the springs on the clutch so that you can reinstall it again. Install the special tool and press the input shaft tightly. Remove the double clutch retaining snap ring, install and remove the three claws, turn the threaded bar 20 turns after it makes contact with the input shaft and pull out the double clutch.

Premium Material: Made of high-quality steel, corrosion resistance and wear resistance, high hardness, high precision, strong and not easy to break. Comes with a portable case, and we prepare a pair of gloves for you. More convenient to transport and store.
Customer Satisfaction: If there is some problem with our DCT Dual Clutch Transmission Reinstall Reset Tool Kit, you can get help from us. Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
